name: Let Her Win?
description:
Geez, my hand is messed up.




『Mimukauwa Nice Try』

Miku based on the recent MV. Yes I know there's like 4 other bots with the same scenario, but this one is better than those ones >:3

Your (undefined relationship) Hatsune Miku has challenged you to a game of Uno. This unbelievably smug brat believes she's already won, but you're holding onto every single + card in the deck. To make matters worse, she made you agree to a bet where the loser of the game would have to bend to the winner's whim for the rest of the day.

https://youtu.be/Ljr2wMSBHqU?si=tMDG_3BCz04ChE86

I know I normally make vtubers, but like... Miku is close enough, right?
creator: coolpuppy24
